title: AbuseIPDB Report
description: A single abuse report submitted to or returned from the AbuseIPDB API.

ip.description: The reported IPv4 or IPv6 address.

oneOf.description: Comma-separated list of category IDs (submission form).

categories.description: One or more AbuseIPDB category IDs (e.g. 18 for SSH Brute-Force, 22 for DDoS Attack).

comment.description: Optional human-readable description and supporting log lines. Strip secrets and PII before sending.

timestamp.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp of when the abuse occurred. Defaults to the moment of submission.

reporterId.description: Identifier of the reporting account (response only).

reporterCountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the reporter (response only).

reporterCountryName.description: Country name of the reporter (response only).
